scripts.mobile:sync: npm run app:build && npx cap sync
scripts.mobile:build:ios: npm run mobile:sync && DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.mobile:build:android: npm run mobile:sync && cd android && JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" ./gradlew :app:assembleDebug
scripts.mobile:run:ios: npm run app:build && DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer npx cap run ios
scripts.mobile:run:android: npm run app:build && JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" npx cap run android
